description: An example skill demonstrating the agent skill format. Use this as a starting point for your own skills.
---

# Example Skill

This is a bundled skill provided by the Skills Onboard extension.

## When to Use

Use this skill when you need a template to build your own agent skill.

## Process

1. Copy this directory to your skills folder
2. Edit the SKILL.md frontmatter with your skill's name and description
3. Replace the instructions below with your own workflow steps
4. Optionally add supporting scripts or resource files in this directory

## Guidelines

- Keep descriptions concise so the agent can match them accurately
- Use numbered steps for sequential workflows
- Reference any supporting scripts using relative paths
